text:
Market today: AI bubble concerns and "Magnificent Seven" issues point to a bearish mood for tech, directly impacting your concentrated book. The critical warning of a "Lehman Bros. moment" for AI is a significant headwind.

Your holdings: SOXL (-42.2%, SELL) and SPAL (-35.63%, NEW) are bleeding heavily due to their leveraged nature; margin amplifies these drops. SMH (-10.02%, TRIM) and QQQI (-2.15%, TRIM) also need attention.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions (SOXL, SPAL) and the overall tech sector's reaction to "AI bubble" warnings. Monitor your stops closely.

Bottom line: Prioritize aggressive risk management, especially on leveraged positions and stops, given your concentration and margin.
plays: SOXL is down 42.2% and flagged SELL; consider cutting losses to protect capital, as margin amplifies drops.
SPAL is down 35.63% and leveraged; respect its stop at 21.38 or consider trimming to manage risk.
Given AI bubble warnings, a small speculative hedge with SOXS (inverse semi ETF) could be considered. Scanner entry 47.26-46.72, stop 45.13.
